I'm sorry. Due to technical issues, we need you to first register an account on this website. If you still cannot log in after registration, please send your game ID to me. We will continue to troubleshoot the problem for you.<:24_smile:1459073862544130131> 

https://accounts.qookkagames.com
Where can I find the game ID if I can't log in?
Is it the one at the bottom?
